footer.copyright: © 2026 Marina Bay Sands. All Rights Reserved.

head.text1: In quiet places, where the world slows down, we have created a space for rest, warmth, and timeless moments.
head.text2: A place where time lingers gently.

about.text1: This place is unlike any other. In the heart of Singapore, it was imagined as a sanctuary above the vibrant city — a place for quiet mornings, warm evenings, and the simple joy of slowing down.
about.text2: For gatherings, for laughter, for the pleasures of good food and gentle conversation.
about.text3: Today, it remains that same place of calm in the rhythm of the city. Welcome to your moment in Singapore.

weare.text1: Born from a belief that every great stay begins with a thoughtfully furnished space, Marina by Sand was founded to bridge the gap between extraordinary design and flawless execution.
weare.text2: As a premier hospitality furnishing partner, we have made it our purpose to elevate every room, lobby, and suite — delivering spaces that guests remember long after they depart.

endToEnd.title: White-Glove, End-to-End Fulfillment
endToEnd.desc: From first consultation to final installation, every detail of your furnishing journey is orchestrated seamlessly — so you may focus on what truly matters.

afterSales.title: Lifelong After-Stay Partnership
afterSales.desc: Our commitment does not conclude at checkout. A dedicated specialist remains at your service for any future refinements, replacements, or evolving needs.

noVariety.title: Unrestricted Selection, Uncompromised Standards
noVariety.desc: Our vendor-agnostic philosophy grants you access to the world's finest furniture houses — selected solely on merit, craftsmanship, and your distinct aesthetic vision.

superiorQuality.title: Superlative Quality, Without Exception
superiorQuality.desc: We partner exclusively with world-class suppliers whose materials, joinery, and finishing standards reflect the calibre your guests deserve to experience.

bespoke.title: Bespoke Pieces, Tailored to Perfection
bespoke.desc: Commissioned creations carrying the precise proportions, materials, and character your space demands — nothing less.

ourworks.label: Marina by Sand — Our Works
ourworks.title: Spaces Crafted for
ourworks.desc: A curated selection of our most distinguished interiors — each one a testament to refined craftsmanship, purposeful design, and the enduring art of hospitality.

robot.needHelp: Need help? I'm here for you!

booking.tagline:
Where Every Stay
Becomes a Memory.
booking.selectCheckin: Please select a check-in date to continue
